mapper.sql: select audit.id, audit.operator_id as operatorId, audit.operator_name as operatorName, audit.operation_action as operationAction, audit.resource_type as resourceType, audit.resource_id as resourceId, audit.operation_result as operationResult, audit.operation_time as operationTime, audit.created_at as createTime, audit.updated_at as updateTime from payment_operation_audit audit
mapper.select: order by audit.operation_time desc, audit.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
